headline: Lowe’s Wants to Help You Change Lightbulbs. How That Could Boost the Stock.

headline: Starmer Says Musk Is Sowing UK Division After Teen’s Murder
summary: (Bloomberg) -- Prime Minister Keir Starmer accused Elon Musk of stoking unrest in Britain after the world’s richest man used the murder of a British teen to say official UK police policy requires officers to be racist against White people.Most Read from BloombergGlazer Family Members Study Manchester United Stake SaleRepublican-Led House Votes to Stop Iran War, Rebuking TrumpTrump Begins Rebuilding His Tariff Wall, Citing Forced LaborBroadcom Slides by Most in More Than a Year on AI Outlook Miss

headline: Home Depot rival hardware chain files Chapter 11 bankruptcy
summary: Independent home improvement chains face intense competition from major big-box retailers like Home Depot and Lowe’s, which has resulted in the smaller competitors having financial distress and, in some cases, filing for bankruptcy. Home Depot dominated the home improvement sector, ...
